name: syncro-now-ai
description: AI-ready ServiceNow MCP server for metadata analysis, dependency graphs, impact analysis, and scoped application documentation.

scripts.build:deps: npm --workspace @syncrona/credential-store run prepack && npm --workspace @syncrona/sn-transport run prepack
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm --workspaces --if-present run prepack
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:mcp
scripts.test:coverage:gates: npm run test:coverage:core && npm run test:coverage:mcp
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run build:deps && npm --workspaces --if-present run prepack
scripts.lint: npm run lint:core && npm run lint:mcp
scripts.quality:all: npm run quality:core && npm run quality:mcp
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:coverage:gates && npm run quality:all
scripts.release:core: npm run build && npm publish --workspace @syncrona/core --access public && bash scripts/tag-core-release.sh
scripts.release:core:dry: npm run build && npm publish --workspace @syncrona/core --access public --dry-run && bash scripts/tag-core-release.sh --dry-run

author: Ivan Baev
